title: Zettel
description: A mnemonic poem describing the core principles of Liechtenauer's fighting system

title: Fior di Battaglia
description: The Flower of Battle - a comprehensive medieval combat manual covering armed and unarmed combat

title: Fechtbuch
description: A detailed commentary on Liechtenauer's teachings with practical applications

title: De Arte Gladiatoria Dimicandi
description: On the Art of Swordsmanship — a comprehensive Italian fighting treatise dedicated to Duke Guidobaldo da Montefeltro of Urbino. Written in verse and prose, it covers longsword, dagger, poleaxe, spear, one-handed sword, armored combat, and grappling, building on the Fiore tradition while introducing original concepts on tempo, measure, and the superiority of the cut over the thrust.
